title: Senior Software Engineer - Cropin Asia Pacific Associates - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Cropin Asia Pacific Associates - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Cropin Asia Pacific Associates. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Software Engineer to strengthen our Allahabad-based team.

About Cropin Asia Pacific Associates:
Cropin Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in React

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cropin Asia Pacific Associates!
